title: GridStatus PJM LMP IT SCED 5 Min
description:
This PJM dataset contains 5-minute real-time IT SCED prices. These prices cover individual ties between areas bordering PJM as well as aggregate prices for ties between PJM and MISO and all PJM ties. 

Locations in this dataset include:

* LINDENVFT
* HUDSONTP
* NEPTUNE
* NYIS
* MISO

IT SCED is the Intermediate-Term Security Constrained Economic Dispatch engine. IT SCED solves 30 minutes prior to the target interval and looks ahead 15, 30, 75, and 120 minutes beyond the target. In terms of PJM real-time market application timing, IT SCED follows the Ancillary Servicers Optimizer (ASO), but is before the Real-Time Security Constrained Economic Dispatch (RT SCED).

⚠️ PJM typically does not backfill this data series in the event of data drops.
